title: MikroTik SFP module S-45/54LC80D, SM, 80km, 1.25G (one pair)
description: The S-4554LC80D is sold as a kit of two single mode WDM modules with Gigabit speed, one LC connector on each side and maximum distance up to 80km. The wavelengths of the modules are 1490 / 1550nm and 1550 / 1490nm
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 1 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1490 / 1550, 1550 / 1490 Distance [km] 80 Transfer type WDM Tx power [dBm] 0 up to 5 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 25 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (1) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 85 General Compatibility Universal
